headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - Section  8. Subcontractor  is  responsible  to  Contractor's  job  superintendent  for  scheduling  of  work  and/or materials; however, directives received by this Subcontractor from the Contractor's Home Office personnel shall govern in case of conflict with the directions of the job superintendent.
